description: Npcap is the Nmap Project's packet capture (and sending) library for Microsoft Windows. Note: Driver installs to C:\Program Files\Npcap due to Windows kernel requirements.
pre_install: if (-not (is_admin)) { abort "`n[ERROR] $app requires admin rights to $cmd." }
pre_uninstall: if (-not (is_admin)) { abort "`n[ERROR] $app requires admin rights to $cmd." }

script: warn 'Npcap uninstaller not found in C:\Program Files\Npcap. Manual removal may be required.'
